title: Not Enough Furniture: Legacy
description: An Addon to MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod
body:
### Working on a huge rewrite!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Not Enough Furniture is an Addon to the classic MrCrayfish's Furniture. This Addon adds new pieces of decoration and furniture!

Comments and Suggestions are greatly appreciated! Send any suggestions in the discord!

https://discord.gg/TwGGTRtFjv

This is my second mod, with my first being Just Enough Grub, which is temporarily discontinued.

This Addon is currently focuses on Aesthetic rather than Functionality. In the future I am planning to add Functionality!

The theme of this Addon is meant to be similar to that of the upcoming Refurbished Furniture Mod that MrCrayfish has announced!

You are allowed to use this in your modpack!

You are allowed to upload videos with the mod just give a link to this page and credit, any videos i find will be put up here on the page!! :D

Dependency:

Not Enough Furniture does require MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod to work.

Not Enough Furniture So Far Adds: Many types of Kitchen Furniture and Many types of Electronics!
